todaysResult.headline: Rodent activity has decreased since our last visit.
todaysResult.body: We checked 8 traps, removed 2 captures, reset the traps, refreshed the bait and completed an exterior inspection today. Trapping will continue until activity is reduced. Entry-point sealing will be scheduled once the exclusion quote is approved.
todaysResult.nextStep: Trapping will continue until activity is reduced. Entry-point sealing will be scheduled once the exclusion quote is approved.
